scripts.dev: npm run dev:api & npm run dev:web & wait
scripts.build: npm --prefix packages/api run build && npm --prefix packages/web run build
scripts.demo:smoke: API_URL=${NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL:-http://localhost:3101}; echo "health:"; curl -fsS "$API_URL/health"; echo; echo "simulate:"; curl -fsS -X POST "$API_URL/api/simulate"; echo
